arts.ttl: Alexander Isak future: Newcastle striker 'makes preference clear' amid Barcelona, Arsenal, Liverpool transfer talk
arts.sum: Newcastle United forward Alexander Isak is allegedly 'very interested' in joining Liverpool at the end of the campaign.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta refuses to rule out using a DEFENDER as a No 9 amid Arsenal's striker crisis - and vows to 'get creative' after Kai Havertz injury
arts.sum: The club were dealt a significant blow earlier this week when it was revealed Kai Havertz suffered a serious hamstring injury during the club's warm-weather training camp.

arts.ttl: The 'special' Arsenal academy striker now starring at Man Utd
arts.sum: Teenage striker Chido Obi swapped Arsenal's academy for Manchester United and is breaking goalscoring records - but how good could he be?

arts.ttl: Premier League LIVE: Leicester City host Arsenal
Arsenal, Newcastle and Villa looking to raid top-four rivals for €50m-rated forward
arts.sum: Arsenal, Newcastle United and Aston Villa are keen on signing the Chelsea striker Nicolas Jackson at the end of the season. The former Villarreal striker has shown improvement this season and he has done reasonably well for the Blues. arts.ttl: Saliba the striker? CB's offer for injury-hit Arsenal
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has revealed that Arsenal defender William Saliba has offered to play up front to ease the north London club's injury crisis.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa, Arsenal and Newcastle United lined up for Spanish transfer tussle
arts.sum: Arsenal, Aston Villa and Newcastle United are all lining up for a Spanish transfer tussle with Atletico Madrid to sign Nicolas Jackson from Chelsea. That’s according to Super Deporte, who report that Atlético are not the only club interested in signing the forward this summer. arts.ttl: Arsenal news: Mikel Arteta ‘SCARED’ of Isak as Gunners face accusations of PR stunt
arts.sum: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta his too scared of signing a genuine No.9 and his bid for Aston Villa ’s Ollie Watkins was nothing more than a PR stunt to appease supporters, so claims Troy Deeney. “Mikel Arteta, is frightened of signing a genuine No 9 like Isak,” Deeney added.
